# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: linkerd
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled

---

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: linkerd-controller
  namespace: linkerd
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: linkerd-controller
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: linkerd-controller
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: linkerd-controller
        image: linkerd/linkerd2:v2.13.0
        ports:
        - containerPort: 4140
          name: linkerd-api
          protocol: TCP
        - containerPort: 9460
          name: linkerd-tap
          protocol: TCP

---

apiVersion: autoscaling/v2beta2
kind: HorizontalPodAutoscaler
metadata:
  name: linkerd-controller
  namespace: linkerd
spec:
  scaleTargetRef:
    apiVersion: apps/v1
    kind: Deployment
    name: linkerd-controller
  minReplicas: 1
  maxReplicas: 10
  metrics:
  - type: Resource
    resource:
      name: cpu
      targetAverageUtilization: 80

---

apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: global
spec:
  tracing:
    enabled: true
    prometheus: {}
  authorization:
    enabled: true
    mode: albaster

---

apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Policy
metadata:
  name: global-deny
spec:
  to:
  - kind: Service
  action: deny

---

# Replace <service_name> with the name of your microservices

apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Policy
metadata:
  name: <service_name>-policy
spec:
  from:
  - kind: ServiceInstance
    name: <service_name>
  to:
  - kind: ServiceInstance
    name: <another_service_name>
  action: allow
